observations: runx --version returned runx-cli 0.6.14 for publish, harness, install, dogfood, and verify commands.
Verified GitHub account RYDE-PLAY/ryde-play is the claimant identity and stars runxhq/runx.
Package name is exactly rollback-judge and registry ref is ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-daf218f5cd7d.
Registry public URL returned HTTP 200 at https://runx.ai/x/ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-daf218f5cd7d.

Registry read resolved owner ryde-play, digest sha256:b6240d8923723e8a07057dd678104dfecab87594695e5e49d0ed4a0ca53e560e, profile digest sha256:e1080cba9ca05a1917ad14be5b5f4ea2ad5f91db95d3cfb1e1d5e314fd4759e8, and runner judge.
Clean install with runx add ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-daf218f5cd7d --registry https://api.runx.ai succeeded.
Local harness passed 2 cases: critical-signal-rollback, signal-contradictory-block.
Hosted-installed harness passed 2 cases: critical-signal-rollback, signal-contradictory-block.
Harness case critical-signal-rollback seals a rollback decision for critical error_rate_spike, reason error_rate_critical, and version_target copied from supplied prior_version.
Harness case critical-signal-rollback seeds release_publish_approval with gate_id release.publish.approval and approved=true; the dispatch names release as the downstream skill.
Harness case signal-contradictory-block omits caller.answers and returns needs_agent, so no decision is sealed and no release approval is seeded.
Dogfood output used deploy_signal severity=critical, kind=error_rate_spike, action=rollback, reason=error_rate_critical, version_target=2026.07.12.2.

Dogfood receipt runx:receipt:sha256:0d8487ce947b67ae04d36bdcea199235e86d1a20e2c45db6030ada7e28bb6577 includes act_judge with form=review and no authority terms, deploy act, provider write, or minted authority.
runx verify returned valid=true, signature.status=valid, signature.mode=production.
The verification public key is published; the private signing seed is not included in artifacts.

commands.dogfood: runx skill ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-daf218f5cd7d --registry https://api.runx.ai --json --input-json deploy_signal=<fixtures/critical-signal.deploy_signal> --input-json current_version=<fixtures/critical-signal.current_version> --input-json prior_version=<fixtures/critical-signal.prior_version> --input-json forward_fix_evidence=<fixtures/critical-signal.forward_fix_evidence>; runx resume run_agent_task-rollback-judge-output /tmp/frantic-102-answer.json --json

dogfood.command: runx skill ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-daf218f5cd7d --registry https://api.runx.ai --json --input-json deploy_signal=<fixtures/critical-signal.deploy_signal> --input-json current_version=<fixtures/critical-signal.current_version> --input-json prior_version=<fixtures/critical-signal.prior_version> --input-json forward_fix_evidence=<fixtures/critical-signal.forward_fix_evidence>; runx resume run_agent_task-rollback-judge-output /tmp/frantic-102-answer.json --json

dispatch.note: Release graph owns the rollback consequence.

receipt_act.purpose: Judge a supplied deploy signal and record a bounded rollback or escalation decision.
receipt_act.legitimacy: Local operator supplied deploy evidence for review; release owns any downstream consequence.

summary: Published ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-daf218f5cd7d as a thin runx rollback review judge with local and hosted harness pass, post-publish dogfood receipt, review-form act, release.publish.approval handoff evidence, and production-mode runx verify verdict.
